steps: Vote to dissolve the LLC according to the operating agreement or by member consent
Wind up business affairs, settle debts, and distribute remaining assets
File final state tax returns with the Vermont Department of Taxes
File Articles of Termination with the Vermont Secretary of State
Cancel any licenses, permits, and registrations
Close business bank accounts and cancel your EIN with the IRS
llc.notes: Filing fee is $20 for LLC termination. The Secretary of State does not accept cash or credit card payments for paper filings; attach a check payable to the Vermont Secretary of State. Online filings can be paid by credit card.

steps: Hold a board of directors meeting to recommend dissolution
Obtain shareholder approval for the dissolution
Wind up business affairs, settle debts, and distribute remaining assets
File final state tax returns with the Vermont Department of Taxes
File Articles of Dissolution with the Vermont Secretary of State
Cancel any licenses, permits, and registrations
Close business bank accounts and cancel your EIN with the IRS
corporation.notes: Filing fee is $35 for corporation dissolution. There are two types of Articles of Dissolution: one by incorporators or initial directors (11A V.S.A. section 14.01) and one by board of directors and shareholders (11A V.S.A. section 14.03). Both cost $35.

tax.notes: Vermont does not require a formal tax clearance certificate for dissolution. However, you must file final income tax returns and settle any outstanding tax obligations with the Vermont Department of Taxes before dissolving.

requirements.employeeNotification: Must provide WARN Act notice (60 days) if 100+ employees
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify known creditors of the dissolution and provide a reasonable deadline for claims
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Registered agent designation terminates upon dissolution
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: LLC: Member vote as specified in operating agreement or by majority consent. Corporation: Board resolution followed by shareholder approval.

includes: Every required form with direct download links
